screens.name: Songs library
screens.purpose: Show the newly extracted chart as a selectable entry in the existing song list.
screens.primary_action: Open a chart from the library

ux_rules: Keep the existing songs workspace layout unchanged for this seed task.
Surface provisional extraction status through summary and chart notes instead of new UI chrome.
Preserve scanability by keeping section and system structure compatible with the current viewer.

screen_contexts.layout_intent: Reuse the current two-pane song library and score viewer without adding new controls.
interaction_risks: Draft extraction content may appear more final than it is.
Long combined chord strings may reduce measure readability in some systems.
notes: This step prioritizes availability in the library over a new draft-state treatment.

constraints: Keep the change additive and localized if possible.
Do not rework the songs UI architecture just to expose one provisional chart.
Keep explicit review markers in the content where extraction remains uncertain.
open_decisions: A future importer should replace this manual seed once lead-sheet publishing is available.

critical_judgments: The new song should be visible and selectable in the existing library.
The score viewer should retain legibility despite combined chord strings and review cues.

visual_constraints: No new visual treatment is required for this provisional seed.
Preserve the established songs workspace styling.
